title: Spatial transcriptomics of the axolotl forebrain
author: Tomás Pires de Carvalho Gomes
content: E-MTAB-11665 Spatial transcriptomics of the axolotl forebrain spatial transcriptomics by high-throughput sequencing EFO EFO_0030005 Ambystoma mexicanum To investigate spatial heterogeneities in the axolotl forebrain, a coronal section of it was obtained for spatial transcriptomics using Visium V1
